role: Configuration management layer for the ArchSpine mirror system.
responsibility: Provides centralized configuration loading, validation, merging, and runtime access for all ArchSpine system settings, including LLM configuration, scan policies, pre-commit hooks, and artifact strategies.

children.role: Configuration factory module providing a default SpineConfig object for the ArchSpine system.
Infrastructure utility module providing environment variable parsing constants and functions.
Infrastructure configuration manager providing centralized access and mutation for the ArchSpine project's runtime settings.
Configuration loader and validator for the ArchSpine system, responsible for reading, parsing, validating, and merging configuration files with defaults.
Configuration resolution utility for the pre-commit setting, determining its boolean value from environment variables or explicit parameters.
Core TypeScript interface defining the contract for accessing supported configuration values within the ArchSpine system.
Type definition module centralizing configuration interfaces and enums for the ArchSpine mirror system.
Infrastructure validation facade for Spine configuration payloads.
